hero.headline: FULL STACK DEVELOPER WITH UX DEPTH
hero.description: I’m a full stack developer with 6 years of SaaS experience across Angular, Flask, MongoDB, C# .NET, and modern React environments. My edge is combining product UX, frontend quality, and practical implementation detail.
hero.framing: I started out in graphic design, specialised in UX, and moved into development to bring my own ideas to life. That background still shapes how I work: I care about architecture and engineering standards, but also how the product looks, feels, and earns user trust.

steps.title: Find the real friction
steps.description: I use interviews, usability testing, and behavioural analytics to understand where users are getting stuck and why.

steps.title: Simplify the product
steps.description: I map workflows, tighten journeys, and improve hierarchy so complex tasks feel easier to understand and complete.

steps.title: Design to ship
steps.description: Because I work comfortably across frontend and supporting backend delivery, I design with implementation in mind and stay close to what actually ships.

whatIEnjoy.title: What I Enjoy Working On
items: SaaS products with complex workflows, data-heavy interfaces, or multiple user contexts.
Teams that want tighter collaboration between discovery, design systems, frontend delivery, and backend implementation.
Platforms where analytics, research, and product judgement can guide meaningful UX improvements and technical decisions.

workIntro: Examples of full-stack product work, UX architecture, and implementation thinking applied to clearer workflows, stronger systems, and better day-to-day usability.
demosIntro: A small set of legacy marketing and lead-generation builds, kept here to show execution range alongside the product case studies.
writingIntro: I occasionally write about frontend craft, UX, accessibility, and what it takes to make digital products clearer in practice.

linkedin.title: Find me on LinkedIn.
linkedin.description: For roles, referrals, and the formal version of my background.

contact.title: Let’s talk.
contact.description: Open to frontend and full stack roles, product-minded development work, and thoughtful SaaS collaborations.
